data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that validate the requirement for time-boxed seat holds during checkout. While the linked use case mentions the need for this feature, there are no prior steps that demonstrate validation of this requirement. This lack of direct evidence leads to the conclusion that the exploratory step cannot be validated as either satisfied or unsatisfied.
gaps: No evidence of time-boxed seat holds validation during checkout.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
